attacks.name: Metric Spoofing
attacks.root_cause: No HMAC authentication on Hello messages
trace: 1. Attacker eavesdrops on Hello(C, metric=0, seq=1)
2. Attacker forges Hello(C, metric=0, seq=1) with fake routing info
3. Honest node B receives forged Hello
4. B accepts metric=0 as legitimate without authentication
5. B installs route through attacker (C→B→Attacker)

attacks.name: Metric Replay
attacks.root_cause: No version binding prevents metric downgrade at same sequence number
attacks.mitigation: MetricVersion binding: increment version when metric changes
trace: 1. Node A broadcasts Hello(A, metric=0, seq=1, v0) at T0
2. Node B accepts route: metric=0, seq=1, v0
3. At T2: Network updates, A broadcasts Hello(A, metric=1, seq=2, v0)
4. Attacker replays OLD Hello(A, metric=0, seq=1, v0)
5. Node C accepts replay despite higher seq number elsewhere

attacks.name: Route Inconsistency (Multi-Hop)
attacks.root_cause: Unprotected nextHop field allows hop manipulation in multi-hop routes
trace: 1. Route learned: C→B→A with metric=2
2. Attacker intercepts B's rebroadcast of A's Hello
3. Attacker modifies nextHop: C→B→Attacker (instead of C→B→A)
4. Attacker re-broadcasts with same metric but changed next-hop
5. Node D receives conflicting route info from B and Attacker
6. Routing table inconsistency: different paths for same destination
7. Selective forwarding / network partitioning attack succeeds

attacks.name: Unauthorized Route Installation
attacks.root_cause: No verification of message origin; attacker can forge routes for any destination
attacks.mitigation: HMAC-based origin authentication using per-node PSK
trace: 1. Attacker crafts fake Hello(FakeNode, metric=0, seq=99)
2. No authentication mechanism to check if attacker can represent FakeNode
3. Honest node C accepts message and installs route to FakeNode
4. Routes traffic destined for FakeNode through attacker
5. Attacker becomes MITM for all FakeNode-destined traffic
attacks.patch_required: HMAC binds message to source node's PSK (only source can generate valid HMAC)
